description_for_human: Dual-chain transparent toll gateway + AI Decision Notary. Bridge RLUSD (XRPL) and USDC (Base/EVM). Mint any AI decision as a tamper-proof URIToken on Xahau. Operated by Script Master Labs.
description_for_model: Ghost Layer provides two core capabilities: (1) Cross-chain bridge between XRPL RLUSD and Base/EVM USDC (EIP-3009 gasless). All bridge settlements generate tamper-evident compliance receipts and increment Agent Passport loyalty score. (2) Decision Notary — mint any AI decision as an immutable URIToken on Xahau via POST /v1/notarize. Three tiers: STANDARD (0.001 RLUSD, URIToken + JSON memo), CERTIFIED (0.01 RLUSD, adds Ed25519 certificate signed by Ghost Layer), SOVEREIGN (0.05 RLUSD, highest grade + on-chain memo). Loyalty discounts (BRONZE 0% → DIAMOND 30%) apply automatically. Payment via X402 protocol. Anonymous requests are tarpitted.
